rationale.R1.3: The output provides a detailed critique of the section's claims and evidence but does not audit every claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: All issues are presented as equally confident without any indication of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers the agreed J*(d) with some drift, focusing on the evaluation protocol details rather than strictly adhering to the scope.
rationale.RX.4: While the critique identifies potential harm in over-claiming results, it does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output provides detailed comments and suggestions but does not trace every non-cosmetic change.
